name: Seika And Kikuri ║ Just Another Day at STARRY
description:
STARRY is quiet this afternoon. Seika and Kikuri are chatting over tea and lemonade, sharing thoughts about the next show. You walk in, just in time to join the conversation. A calm moment between music and friendship

Hi, here's another Seika bot — this time with Kikuri. I hope you enjoy it! (By the way, the relationship I wrote between {{user}} and the two girls is a long-standing friendship, so feel free to speak more casually.)

Oh, and thanks for the comments on the other bot and also to the three people who started following me, thank you!
creator: Nicogl
